zh.Hanley William, Worcestershire, England: 英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾亨利 威廉
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isolde Hanley於大約1333年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾亨利 威廉時，她的父親John de Hanley35歲，母親Mrs. John Joannis Hanley25歲。她於1355年與Peter de Washborne在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾易亞斯坦結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1361年在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾蕾托 沃希布恩享年29歲。

nameMeanings.name: Hanley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Conor, Declan, Donovan, Eamonn, John Patrick.

Irish: shortened form of O'Hanley, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hÁinle ‘descendant of Áinle’, a personal name meaning ‘champion’. This is the name of a former ruling family in Connacht and is now common throughout southern Ireland.

English: habitational name from any of the many places called Handley (Cheshire, Derbyshire, Dorset, Northamptonshire) or Hanley (Staffordshire, Worcestershire), named with Old English hēan, the weak dative form (originally used after a preposition and article) of hēah ‘high’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

variants.name: Handley
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Hanley  .

variants.name: Hanly
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Hanley  .

variants.name: Hendley
meanings: English: variant of Hanley or else a variant of Henley with intrusive -d-.

variants.name: Handly
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Hanley  .

nameMeanings.name: Isolde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The name of the tragic mistress of Tristan in the Arthurian romances. There are several versions of the story. The main features are that the beautiful Isolde, an Irish princess, is betrothed to the aged King Mark of Cornwall. However, through accidentally drinking a magic potion, she and the young Cornish knight Tristan fall in love, with tragic consequences. The story has exercised a powerful hold on the European imagination. The name was relatively common in Britain in the Middle Ages, but is much rarer today.

variants.name: Isolda
meanings: The name of the tragic mistress of Tristan in the Arthurian romances. There are several versions of the story. The main features are that the beautiful Isolde, an Irish princess, is betrothed to the aged King Mark of Cornwall. However, through accidentally drinking a magic potion, she and the young Cornish knight Tristan fall in love, with tragic consequences. The story has exercised a powerful hold on the European imagination. The name was relatively common in Britain in the Middle Ages, but is much rarer today.

en.lifeSummary: When Isolde Hanley was born about 1333, in Hanley William, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Hanley, was 35 and her mother, Mrs. John Joannis Hanley, was 25. She married Peter de Washborne in 1355, in Eastham, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1361, in Little Washbourne, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isolde Hanley est née environ 1333, à Hanley William, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Hanley, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Mrs. John Joannis Hanley, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Peter de Washborne en 1355, à Eastham, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1361, à Little Washbourne, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 29 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Isolde Hanleyが約1333年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアハンリー ウィリアムで生まれた時，父John de Hanleyは35歳，母Mrs. John Joannis Hanleyは25歳であった。1355年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエアスサムでPeter de Washborneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1361年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアリットル ワシュボウルンで29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isolde Hanley(이)가 대략 1333년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 핸리 윌리엄에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Hanley(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. John Joannis Hanley(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1355년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 이스섬에서 Peter de Washborne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1361년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 리틀 와스h보우른에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isolde Hanley родилась около 1333 г. в местности ханли уиллам, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Hanley было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. John Joannis Hanley, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Peter de Washborne в 1355 г. в местности эастам, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1361 г. в местности литл вашбурн, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 29 лет.
